summary: Step 4 (Roomie Profile quiz) PASSED end-to-end. Backend: 8/8 pytest tests green (GET empty default, PUT upserts, GET-after-PUT persistence, overwrite, full 15-answer payload, validation 422s, empty {} accepted, no Mongo _id leaks). Frontend (390x844 mobile): profile-screen renders with premium 'Roomie Profile' row at the very top (y=12, well above avatar at y=190); tapping opens roomie-profile-screen; bottom-tab-bar correctly HIDDEN on quiz (and restored on Profile); all 15 questions (question-q1..q15) and 45 options (option-q<n>-0/1/2) present as radio cards; selecting highlights (selected bg rgb(224,251,232) differs from unselected); progress shows '5/15 answered'; top-right Back button (x+w=374 of 390) triggers PUT to /api/roomie-profile/<userId> and navigates router.back(); re-opening reloads selections (5/15) and selected option visually persists. RN web shadow*/pointerEvents warnings carry over from earlier steps (cosmetic, non-blocking).

react_native_issues.issue: Console warnings: '"shadow*" style props are deprecated. Use boxShadow.' and 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. Not introduced by step 4 code (roomie-profile.tsx uses no shadow*/pointerEvents). Reference: /app/frontend/app/(tabs)/roommates.tsx and /app/frontend/src/components/SwipeDeck.tsx.

critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses datetime.utcnow() for StatusCheck default (legacy code, not new) — roomie endpoints correctly use datetime.now(timezone.utc) — OK.
roomie-profile.tsx handleBack swallows save errors and still navigates back — acceptable per spec ('auto-save' is best-effort) but consider a toast/log for the user if offline.
userId.ts uses Math.random for uuidv4 (not crypto-secure); fine for a local anonymous device id.
API route /roomie-profile/{user_id} is unauthenticated — anyone with the user_id can read/write. Acceptable for this anonymous-quiz feature; flag for future auth hardening.
seed_data_creation: Backend tests create TEST_<uuid> roomie_profiles documents (left in DB; harmless, prefixed for cleanup).
context_for_next_testing_agent: testIDs in play: profile-screen, roomie-profile-row, roomie-profile-screen, roomie-back-button, roomie-loading, question-q1..q15, option-q<n>-0/1/2, bottom-tab-bar, tab-profile/tab-roommates/tab-matches/tab-apartments. Profile tab is selected via [data-testid="tab-profile"] (no text labels). The quiz route is /roomie-profile (top-level, outside (tabs) group) which is why the tab bar is hidden.
